title: Enhance auto value assigning in respect to the selected filters.

posts.author: AryeRamaty (Arye)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When Creating an item in a board with filter, it could be nice if the item will select a filed value within the range of the filter.
For example, even if the default value for “status” is “waiting for review” if you’ve created the task in a view where you only see task “in progrees”, the default status value will be “in progress”

What are you trying to achieve

When Creating an item in a board with filter, it could be nice if the item will select a filed value within the range of the current filters.
For example, even if the default value for “status” is “waiting for review”, if you’ve created the task in a view where you only see task “in progrees”, the default item’s status value will be “in progress”.
